arg.name: robot_name
arg.description: TurtleBot name printed on the robot

executable.cmd: bash -lc "printf \"%s\" \"$(var robot_name)\" | robot-setup.sh && unset ROS_LOCALHOST_ONLY && source ~/robotics/ros2-topological-mapping-navigation/ros2_ws/install/setup.bash && ~/robotics/ros2-topological-mapping-navigation/ros2_ws/venv/bin/python -m topological_nav.person_follow_node --ros-args -p start_active:=$(var auto_follow)"

bash -lc "printf \"%s\" \"$(var robot_name)\" | robot-setup.sh && unset ROS_LOCALHOST_ONLY && source ~/robotics/ros2-topological-mapping-navigation/ros2_ws/install/setup.bash && ~/robotics/ros2-topological-mapping-navigation/ros2_ws/venv/bin/python -m topological_nav.gesture_node"

bash -lc "printf \"%s\" \"$(var robot_name)\" | robot-setup.sh && unset ROS_LOCALHOST_ONLY && source ~/robotics/ros2-topological-mapping-navigation/ros2_ws/install/setup.bash && ~/robotics/ros2-topological-mapping-navigation/ros2_ws/venv/bin/python -m topological_nav.qr_node"

bash -lc "printf \"%s\" \"$(var robot_name)\" | robot-setup.sh && unset ROS_LOCALHOST_ONLY && source ~/robotics/ros2-topological-mapping-navigation/ros2_ws/install/setup.bash && ~/robotics/ros2-topological-mapping-navigation/ros2_ws/venv/bin/python -m topological_nav.follow_manager"
